value.header_text_1: ??Enjoy Free Shipping on order above ?2599 | Shop Now       ?? Real Food. Real Farmers. Real Health      ?? Every Order Supports Tribal Farmers      ?? Shop 20+ Traditional Foods & Family Combos
value.about_description:
HaiFarmer brings naturally grown, minimally processed foods directly from trusted farmers to your home. From traditional millets and pulses to spices, jaggery, and natural farm products, every item is carefully sourced to preserve purity, nutrition, and authentic taste. We believe in supporting sustainable farming while helping families choose healthier, chemical-free food every day.

Eat Pure. Support Farmers. Live Healthy. ??

value.name: White Rajma
value.description:
HaiFarmer White Rajma | Premium Natural Kidney Beans

Naturally cultivated white kidney beans with excellent texture and nutrition.

Perfect for protein-rich meals and healthy family diets.

value.name: Red Rajma
value.description:
HaiFarmer Red Rajma | Traditional Kidney Beans


Carefully sourced kidney beans known for their rich taste and wholesome nutrition.

An excellent source of plant protein and dietary fibre.

value.name: Forest Tamarind
value.description:
HaiFarmer Tamarind | Forest-Sourced Chinthapandu

Naturally and forest matured tamarind sourced from tribal regions known for traditional harvesting practices.
Adds authentic tanginess and rich flavour to everyday cooking.

value.name: Konda Samalu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Samalu | Little Millet



A traditional millet celebrated for its nutrition and easy digestibility.

An excellent alternative to polished grains.

value.name: Adavi Avalu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Natural Avalu | Traditional Mustard Seeds

Aromatic mustard seeds sourced from traditional farming regions.

Perfect for tempering, pickles, and authentic Indian cooking.

value.name: HaiFarmer Alasandhalu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Erra Bobbarlu | Native Red Cowpeas



Traditional red cowpeas sourced from farming communities preserving indigenous crop varieties.

Rich in protein, minerals, and dietary fibre.

value.name: Erra Jonnalu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Erra Jonnalu | Red Sorghum


Traditional red sorghum valued for its rich nutritional profile and heritage significance.

Naturally filling and rich in dietary fibre.

value.name: HaiFarmer Agency Karam
value.description:
Prepared using tribal-grown red chillies known for their natural colour, aroma, and balanced spice levels.

A traditional chilli powder that delivers authentic flavour without artificial colours or additives.

value.name: HaiFarmer Tribal Pasupu
value.description:
Sourced from tribal farming communities and naturally grown without intensive chemical cultivation. Rich in natural curcumin, aroma, and traditional medicinal value.

Bring home authentic tribal turmeric trusted for generations in traditional Indian kitchens.

value.name: Nattu Pesalu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Nattu Pesalu | Traditional Green Gram

Traditional green gram cultivated using local farming knowledge passed down through generations.
Naturally rich in protein, fibre, and essential nutrients.

value.name: Natu Minapappu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Traditional Minumulu | Black Gram


Naturally cultivated black gram used in countless traditional Indian recipes.

Rich in protein and valued for its wholesome nutrition.

value.name: Konda Kandhi Pappu
value.description:
HaiFarmer Konda Kandhi Pappu | Traditional Toor Dal

Traditionally cultivated pigeon pea sourced from tribal hill farming communities.
Nutritious, protein-rich, and a staple ingredient in wholesome Indian meals

value.description:

Naturally grown cowpeas valued for their nutrition and versatility in traditional cooking.

A healthy addition to balanced family meals.

value.description:

An ancient millet variety once widely consumed by earlier generations.

Packed with fibre and naturally nourishing nutrients.

value.name: HaiFarmer Wild Honey
value.description:
HaiFarmer Wild Honey | Forest-Collected Putta Honey

Collected from forest regions where bees naturally forage on wild flowers and native vegetation.
Raw, naturally sweet, and packed with the goodness of untouched forest ecosystems.

value.description:

A traditional super grain consumed for generations across rural India.

Rich in minerals, fibre, and natural energy.

Traditional sorghum grain cultivated for generations in dryland farming systems.

A wholesome grain suitable for healthy everyday meals.

Naturally occurring rock salt rich in trace minerals and traditional culinary value.

A natural alternative to heavily refined table salt.

value.bundle_description:
A collection of six traditional millets and sprouted ragi once eaten by our grandparents and still cherished in tribal communities. Perfect for families looking to bring diverse, nutrient-rich grains back to their plates.

Contains: 6 Millets (500g each) + Sprouted Ragi (1kg) [CONTAINS] Arikalu (500g), Samalu (500g), Korralu (500g), Tella jonnalu (500g), Erra jonnalu (500g), Sajjalu (500g), Sprouted ragi (1kg)

value.bundle_description:
Bring home the goodness of nature with our Tribal Family Combo, thoughtfully curated with premium products sourced directly from tribal farmers. Every item is naturally grown, carefully selected, and packed to preserve its freshness, purity, and authentic taste.

This combo is perfect for families who value traditional foods, natural farming, and clean ingredients in their everyday meals. By choosing this combo, you not only enjoy wholesome quality but also support the livelihoods of tribal farming communities. [CONTAINS] Karam (1kg), Pasupu (250g), Avalu (100g), Chintapandu (500g), Miryalu (100g), Sugar (1kg), Pink Rock Salt (1kg)

value.bundle_description:
Experience the richness of traditional living with our Tribal Complete Family Combo, carefully curated to meet your family's everyday kitchen needs. Every item is sourced directly from trusted tribal farmers who follow natural farming practices, ensuring purity, freshness, and authentic taste in every pack.

Designed for families who value wholesome food and traditional nutrition, this combo brings together premium-quality essentials that support a healthy lifestyle while empowering tribal farming communities. Every product is carefully cleaned, quality-checked, and hygienically packed to preserve its natural goodness. [CONTAINS] Arikalu (500g), Samalu (500g), Korralu (500g), Tella Jonnalu (500g), Erra Jonnalu (500g), Sajjalu (500g), Sprouted Ragi Powder (1kg), Nalla Bobbarllu (500g),
Tella Bobbarllu (500g), Red Rajma (500g), White Rajma (500g), Konda Kandhulu (1kg), Pesalu (500g), Minumulu (1kg), Karam (1kg), Pasupu (250g), Avalu (100g), Chintapandu (500g), Miryalu (100g), Sugar (1kg), Pink Rock Salt (1kg)
